message:
fix(abi): correct indentation and formatting in runtime_policy panic hook and glibc_internal test

The panic hook in `ensure_minimal_panic_hook` had payload-printing code
indented at the wrong level — the payload prefix, downcast branches, and
final newline were siblings of the `if seen == 0` block instead of being
nested inside it. This caused the payload to be printed unconditionally
on every panic rather than only on the first. Re-indent the block so
payload extraction runs inside the seen-guard, matching the intent of
the reentrancy protection.

Also fix `res_nquerydomain_null_returns_error` test to break the long
function call across multiple lines (rustfmt compliance), and remove
a spurious double blank line between test helpers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
